    Index

    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages

    H

    hasRoom(int) - Method in class pl.edu.agh.kis.pz1.model.Hotel
    Returns whether the hotel contains a room with the given number.
    Hotel - Class in pl.edu.agh.kis.pz1.model
    Represents a hotel as a collection of rooms indexed by room number.
    Hotel(String) - Constructor for class pl.edu.agh.kis.pz1.model.Hotel
    Creates a Hotel with the given name.
    HotelDataLoader - Class in pl.edu.agh.kis.pz1.io
    Utility class responsible for loading hotel configuration and state from CSV files.
    HotelDataSaver - Class in pl.edu.agh.kis.pz1.io
    Utility class responsible for saving hotel state to a CSV file.
    HotelManagerApp - Class in pl.edu.agh.kis.pz1.app
    This class loads hotel data (either from a saved CSV if present and accepted by the user, or from the default CSV) and starts an interactive command loop (REPL).
    HotelManagerApp() - Constructor for class pl.edu.agh.kis.pz1.app.HotelManagerApp
     
    HotelService - Class in pl.edu.agh.kis.pz1.service
    Service layer encapsulating hotel business logic.
    HotelService(Hotel) - Constructor for class pl.edu.agh.kis.pz1.service.HotelService
    Constructs a service for the provided hotel.
